Home.title: A Luxurious Escape in the Heart of History

Rooms.title: Refined Rooms & Suites
Rooms.text: Discover our accommodations that combine the stone architecture of Kozbeyli Mansion with the peaceful Aegean view.

FAQPage.title: Your Questions, Answered
FAQPage.heroText: We have gathered the questions most often asked when planning a stay. For any detail left unanswered, our guest relations team is only a message away.

GalleryPage.title: A Journal of Stone and Light
GalleryPage.heroText: Andesite stone walls, a courtyard waking to the morning sun, and the Aegean's table culture. Wander through the mansion's daily rhythm in photographs.

OffersPage.title: Offers from the Mansion
OffersPage.heroText: Speak with our guest relations team about stay and event packages thoughtfully curated for each season and special occasion; together we will plan the experience that suits you best.

ExperiencesHub.title: Experience Kozbeyli
ExperiencesHub.heroText: Discover the village, coastal and culinary routes reaching from the mansion's stone walls to the Aegean shores, through guides curated just for you.

Footer.description: A refined Foça stay in Kozbeyli, where five-century village texture is reinterpreted with luxury and comfort.
